projectDescription: AI-powered daily intelligence digest for indie hackers and builders, synthesizing signals from 10+ sources including Hacker News, GitHub, Product Hunt, HuggingFace, Google Trends, and Reddit into actionable build recommendations every morning.
keyFeatures: Daily AI-synthesized analysis of 300+ signals across 10+ sources
20 structured questions answered each morning covering launches, trends, and opportunities
Actionable build recommendations — what to build in 2 hours vs. a weekend
Fast-growing open-source project discovery with commercialization gap analysis
Trending search term radar with multi-source cross-validation
Developer tool complaint tracking to surface pain point opportunities
Bilingual reports in English and Chinese
Revenue and pricing case studies from real indie developers
Counter-intuitive finding of the day for contrarian builders
publicApiSurface: Report sections: Discovery, Tech Radar, Competitive Intel, Trends, Action
